WPFProfileCreateWithOptions.Description: Name a profile and choose whether to save current Install apps, Tweaks, toggles, and/or Config features. Optionally merge into an existing profile file.

WPFProfileSave.Description: Saves selected apps, tweaks, toggles, and features as a named profile.

WPFProfileLoad.Description: Loads a named profile into current selections.

WPFAutoReapplyEnable.Description: Creates scheduled tasks that rerun the selected profile on logon and startup.

WPFAutoReapplyDisable.Description: Removes scheduled tasks created for automatic reapply.

WPFRollbackLastTweak.Description: Restores the most recent captured tweak state from rollback journal.
